title: Universal Tool Compact Eye Glasses Repair Kit in Case Fixing Vision Care
description:
Have you ever needed to repair your eyeglasses and had to wait to take them to the repair shop? Wait no more with the emergency eyeglass repair kit! This kit comes with everything you’ll need to make common repairs - a precision screwdriver, 4 replacement screws, 2 nose pads, and 2 grommets. All of the repair tools and accessories fit neatly inside of a compact plastic storage case measuring just 4” in length. You can easily store it in your pocket, purse, backpack, or car for quick and convenient repairs. Each kit comes with a precision screwdriver, 4 replacement screws, 2 nose pads, and 2 grommets so you can make common eyeglass repairs with ease

Universal Tool Compact Eye Glasses Repair Kit in Case Fixing Vision Care

Have you ever needed to repair your eyeglasses and had to wait to take them to the repair shop? Wait no more with the emergency eyeglass repair kit! This kit comes with everything you’ll need to make common repairs - a precision screwdriver, 4 replacement screws, 2 nose pads, and 2 grommets.

Key Features

  • EMERGENCY EYE GLASS REPAIR KIT – The eyeglass repair kit will come in handy if you need to repair your glasses on the go and can’t wait to take them to the repair shop and will save you from having to buy a new pair of glasses.
  • COMPACT CONTAINER TUBE – All of the repair tools and accessories fit neatly inside of a compact plastic storage case measuring just 4” in length. You can easily store it in your pocket, purse, backpack, or car for quick and convenient repairs.
  • ACCESSORIES AND REPAIR TOOLS – Each kit comes with a precision screwdriver, 4 replacement screws, 2 nose pads, and 2 grommets so you can make common eyeglass repairs with ease.
  • VERSATILE EYEGLASSES REPAIR KIT – In addition to repairing eyeglasses, you can also use these precision tools and accessories to fix your favorite sunglasses, small electronics, and other appliances that require precise repairs in hard-to-reach places.
  • SPECIFICATIONS – 10 piece kit (screwdriver, replacement screws, nose pads, and grommets), Materials: plastic/steel; Plastic storage case with red lid; Compact design

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 1101
  • UPC: 109665404137
  • Color: Clear
